title: Vung Tau、Ba Ria-Vung Tau — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Vung Tau、Ba Ria-Vung Tau的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Vung Tau是Ba Ria-Vung Tau的一個城市，人口約450,000。A coastal city near Ho Chi Minh City known for its beaches, oil industry, and as a weekend getaway destination, offering a more relaxed pace than the big city.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
